# Camitrade Investment Fiduciaries

> Camitrade Investment Fiduciaries is a leading global fiduciary, licensing, and corporate services provider headquartered in Mauritius (since 2010). The firm helps businesses incorporate, obtain regulatory licenses, open banking facilities, and operate compliantly across 10+ jurisdictions. Clients include fintech founders, fund managers, crypto and VASP companies, payment service providers, insurance firms, gaming operators, and international entrepreneurs. With 500+ global clients served and 10+ years of experience, Camitrade is distinguished by a compliance-first philosophy — prioritizing regulatory soundness over speed so that structures and licenses remain future-proof as businesses scale.

## About Camitrade Investment Fiduciaries

Camitrade Investment Fiduciaries was founded to solve the fragmentation of expertise across jurisdictions, regulatory frameworks, and service providers that was failing businesses in regulated industries — particularly finance, fintech, crypto, insurance, and payments. The firm's founding insight is that regulatory compliance is not a one-time transaction, but a foundational element of sustainable business growth. Getting licensing, structuring, and compliance wrong in regulated industries carries costs far beyond financial penalties: regulatory sanctions, operational shutdowns, reputational damage, and years of corrective work.

**Offices**: Ebene, Mauritius (HQ) · Nairobi, Kenya · Mahe, Seychelles · Business Bay, Dubai (UAE) · Kingston, Saint Vincent and the Grenadines · Cyprus

**Contact**: info@camitrade.com · sales@camitrade.com · +248 2 668 292 · +971 56 106 6155 · +254 715 826 827 · +357 95 990 867

**Website**: https://www.camitrade.com

**Social**: [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/camitrade-investment-fiduciaries/) · [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61550690340665) · [Instagram](https://instagram.com/camitradeinvestmentfiduciaries) · [X/Twitter @CFiduciaries](https://x.com/CFiduciaries)

---

## Why Businesses Choose Camitrade

1. **10+ Jurisdictions with Local Regulatory Knowledge** — Licensed partners across Africa, Europe, the Middle East, and offshore centers who know local regulations, enforcement priorities, and compliance culture.
2. **End-to-End Solutions, No Handoffs** — Company formation → regulatory licensing → bank account opening → payment infrastructure, all from one partner.
3. **Compliance-First, No Shortcuts** — Every recommendation is grounded in thorough analysis of regulatory requirements and long-term compliance obligations. No shortcuts that compromise regulatory integrity.
4. **Dedicated Relationship Managers** — Every client is assigned a dedicated expert with direct access and fast response times.
5. **Fintech, Crypto & VASP Expertise** — Deep experience in crypto-friendly jurisdictions, VASP licensing frameworks, and fintech regulatory compliance.
6. **Jurisdiction-Aware Advice** — What works in one jurisdiction may be inappropriate in another even when technically compliant. Camitrade provides contextually appropriate, not just legally correct, guidance.
7. **Long-Term Advisory Partnership** — Ongoing regulatory monitoring, compliance maintenance, and adaptation as businesses and regulations evolve.
8. **Transparent Pricing** — No hidden fees; detailed quotes provided during free initial consultation.

**Key Statistics**: 500+ global clients · 10+ jurisdictions · 10+ years of experience · 6,589+ projects completed · 7,530+ satisfied customers

---

## How It Works (Three-Step Process)

1. **Free Consultation** — Camitrade's team assesses your goals, jurisdiction preferences, industry, and regulatory requirements. No obligation, fully confidential.
2. **Strategy & Structuring** — A compliance-first roadmap is created tailored to your industry and business model, with a clear timeline and transparent pricing.
3. **Execution & Ongoing Support** — Camitrade handles formation, licensing applications, banking setup, and assigns a dedicated relationship manager for ongoing compliance support.

---

## Corporate Services

**Overview**: [https://www.camitrade.com/corporate-services](https://www.camitrade.com/corporate-services)

Camitrade provides full-cycle corporate services for businesses establishing or restructuring international operations.

- **International Business Company (IBC) Formation** — Offshore IBC incorporation across Seychelles (1-day, zero corporate tax), BVI (2-day, zero corporate tax), Mauritius, and other jurisdictions. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/corporate-services/IBC_Formation)
- **Registered Agent Services** — Statutory registered agent, local presence, and legal address solutions required by most offshore jurisdictions. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/corporate-services/Registered_Agent_Services)
- **Trust and Foundation Registration** — Asset protection trusts and private foundations for wealth preservation, legacy planning, and structural privacy. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/corporate-services/Trust_and_Foundation_Registration)
- **Nominee Director and Shareholder Services** — Nominee arrangements for privacy and compliance where beneficial ownership is sensitive. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/corporate-services/Nominee_Director_and_Shareholder_Services)
- **Bank Account Opening** — Corporate and personal bank account facilitation with vetted banking partners globally, including correspondent and fintech banking. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/corporate-services/Bank_Account_Opening)
- **Accounting and Auditing** — Bookkeeping, IFRS-compliant financial statements, annual returns, and audit coordination across jurisdictions. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/corporate-services/Accounting_and_Auditing)
- **Legal Opinions** — Jurisdiction-specific legal opinions and regulatory guidance letters accepted by banks, regulators, and counterparties. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/corporate-services/Legal_Opinions)
- **Virtual and Physical Office Services** — Registered address, mail handling, telephone answering, meeting rooms, and full physical office solutions. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/corporate-services/Virtual_Office_Services)

---

## Regulatory Licensing Services

**Overview**: [https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services)

Camitrade specializes in obtaining regulatory licenses across financial services, fintech, crypto, gaming, insurance, and banking sectors. Below are highlighted licenses with key details.

### Financial Services & Investment Licenses

- **Mauritius Investment Dealer License** (FSC-regulated) — 30–45 day processing time; USD 15,000 minimum capital requirement. Authorizes dealing in securities and derivatives. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services/Investment_Dealer_License)
- **Seychelles Securities Dealer License** (FSA-regulated) — USD 50,000 capital requirement; 30-day processing. Authorizes trading in stocks, bonds, forex, and cryptocurrencies globally. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services/Brokerage_License)
- **Kenya Capital Markets License — Non-Dealing Online Forex Broker** (CMA-regulated) — KES 30 million capital requirement; 1:400 leverage. Authorizes operation of forex trading platforms in East Africa. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services/Brokerage_License)
- **Labuan Money Broking License** (Labuan FSA-regulated) — 3% corporate tax rate; RM 500,000 capital requirement. Authorizes forex and money market operations across Asia. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services/Brokerage_License)
- **Vanuatu Securities Dealer License** (VFSC-regulated) — USD 50,000 capital requirement; 20-year corporate tax exemption. Authorizes securities trading and forex operations. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services/Brokerage_License)

### Cryptocurrency & Virtual Asset Licenses (VASP)

- **Mauritius Virtual Asset Service Provider (VASP) License** (FSC-regulated) — Clear and progressive framework for virtual assets. Authorizes crypto exchange, DeFi services, and NFT platforms globally. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services/Crypto_VASP_License)
- **Seychelles Virtual Asset Service Provider (VASP) License** (FSA-regulated) — Progressive regulatory framework. Authorizes crypto exchange, DeFi, and NFT services globally. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services/Crypto_VASP_License)

### Payment Services Licenses

- **Mauritius Payment Intermediary Services License** (Bank of Mauritius-regulated) — 3% corporate tax rate; MUR 500,000 capital requirement. Authorizes payment processing, card acquiring, and remittance services globally. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services/Investment_Dealer_License)
- **Zambia Payments Systems Business License** (Bank of Zambia / BoZ-regulated, National Payment System Act 2007) — Authorizes money transfer, transmission, and payment systems business. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/psp-services/Zambia_PSP)
- **Nigeria Payment Solution Service Provider (PSSP) License** (Central Bank of Nigeria / CBN-regulated, CBN Act 2007 & BOFIA 1991) — Authorizes operation within Nigeria's regulated payments ecosystem. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/psp-services/Nigeria_PSSP)

### Gaming & Gambling Licenses

- Online gaming operator licenses, sports betting licenses, and casino operator licenses across multiple jurisdictions. Camitrade advises on jurisdiction selection, application, and ongoing compliance. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services/Gaming_License)

### Insurance Licenses

- Captive insurance, reinsurance, portfolio insurance, and insurance broker licenses. Camitrade handles application preparation, regulator liaison, and post-license compliance support. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services/Insurance_License)

### Banking Licenses

- Full commercial banking licenses and offshore banking unit (OBU) licenses across multiple jurisdictions. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services/Banking_License)

### Compliance & Post-Licensing Services

- **Compliance Officer Outsourcing** — Outsourced Money Laundering Reporting Officer (MLRO), compliance officer, and regulatory reporting for licensed entities that do not maintain in-house compliance functions. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services/Compliance_Officer)
- **Post-Licensing Support** — Ongoing regulatory compliance maintenance, license renewals, annual filings, and regulatory change monitoring. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services/Post_Licensing_Support)
- **Professional Indemnity Assistance** — Professional indemnity (PI) insurance procurement and risk management advisory for regulated entities. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services/Professional_Indemnity)

---

## Specialist & Other Services

**Overview**: [https://www.camitrade.com/other-services](https://www.camitrade.com/other-services)

- **Aircraft & Ship Registration** — Offshore registration of aircraft and vessels for asset protection, tax efficiency, and operational flexibility. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/other-services/Aircraft_Ship_Registration)
- **Assets & Investment Advisory** — Cross-border portfolio structuring, investment advisory, and asset holding structure optimization. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/other-services/Assets_Investment_Advisory)
- **Electronic Money & Money Services Businesses (MSB)** — E-money institution (EMI) setup, money services business licensing, and prepaid instrument programs. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/other-services/MSB)
- **Foundations & Non-Profits** — Private foundation registration and non-profit/NGO incorporation for philanthropic, family governance, or purpose-driven structures. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/other-services/Foundations_Non_Profits)
- **Investment Funds** — Investment fund structuring, regulatory licensing (open-ended, closed-ended, hedge, private equity), and fund administration. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/other-services/Investments_Funds)
- **LLC Formation** — Limited liability company incorporation across US, offshore, and international jurisdictions tailored to operational and tax objectives. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/other-services/LLC)
- **Offshore Company Incorporation** — Offshore holding and operating company structures for tax efficiency, asset protection, and international trade. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/other-services/Offshore_Company)
- **Pension Services** — Offshore occupational and personal pension plan setup and administration for international workforces. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/other-services/Pension_Services)
- **Trademark Registration** — International trademark filing (Madrid Protocol and direct national applications), IP protection strategy, and brand registration. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/other-services/Trademark_Registration)
- **Credit & Bond Institutions** — Setup and licensing for credit institutions, bond issuers, and structured finance vehicles. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/other-services/Credit_Bond)
- **Data Reporting Services** — Trade repository reporting, regulatory data submissions, and FATCA/CRS compliance reporting. [Details](https://www.camitrade.com/other-services/Data_Reporting)

---

## Payment Solutions

**Overview**: [https://www.camitrade.com/payments](https://www.camitrade.com/payments)

Camitrade connects businesses to a global network of vetted, regulated payment providers offering:

- **Online Card Collection & Merchant Acquiring** — VISA, Mastercard, American Express, Diners Club, Discover, and JCB card acceptance for e-commerce and digital businesses.
- **Domestic & International Payouts** — Efficient disbursement solutions for payroll, affiliate payments, and supplier settlements across borders.
- **API-Enabled Integrations** — Flexible API connections enabling seamless integration into existing payment infrastructure.
- **Mobile Money Solutions** — Mobile money acceptance across African markets: Kenya (M-Pesa/Safaricom), Uganda, Tanzania, Ghana, and Rwanda.
- **Multi-Currency Settlement** — Support for multiple currencies with competitive FX rates and efficient settlement cycles.
- **Region-Specific Payment Methods**:
  - *Africa*: Mobile money (Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania, Ghana, Rwanda)
  - *Latin America*: Online, cash, QR code (Chile, Brazil, Ecuador, Peru, Costa Rica, Mexico, Colombia), cash-only (Panama, Guatemala), installment/loan money (Peru)

**Industries Supported for Payment Solutions**: Forex and financial services · Online gaming and gambling · Export and import · Oil and energy · Pharmaceuticals and healthcare · E-commerce and online education · Travel and hospitality · Consumer goods and retail.

**Compliance commitment**: Camitrade works exclusively with vetted, regulated payment partners and ensures all merchant operations align with applicable financial regulations and AML/KYC requirements in each jurisdiction.

---

## Industries Served

- **Fintech** — Company formation, licensing (EMI, PSP, investment), banking, and compliance for financial technology startups and scale-ups.
- **Crypto & Blockchain** — VASP licensing, crypto-friendly jurisdictions (Mauritius, Seychelles, SVG), AML/KYC framework setup, and regulatory compliance for blockchain businesses.
- **Banking & Financial Services** — Banking license applications, offshore banking units, financial holding structures, and correspondent banking facilitation.
- **Insurance** — Captive, reinsurance, and portfolio insurance licensing; insurance company formation; ongoing regulatory compliance.
- **Gaming & Gambling** — Gaming operator licenses, jurisdiction selection (Malta, Isle of Man, Curaçao, etc.), and regulatory compliance for online gaming companies.
- **Investment Funds & Asset Management** — Fund structuring (hedge, PE, mutual), regulatory licensing, fund administration, and investor reporting compliance.
- **Technology & Software** — International corporate structures for IP holding, revenue routing, staff employment, and global expansion for tech companies.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is a fiduciary services provider?**
A fiduciary services provider like Camitrade acts on behalf of clients in legal, regulatory, and corporate matters — including company formation, licensing applications, trust administration, and ongoing compliance management. Fiduciary duty means acting in the client's best interest with the highest standard of care, loyalty, and transparency.

**What jurisdictions does Camitrade operate in?**
Camitrade has active operations and regulatory relationships in Mauritius, Seychelles, Kenya, United Arab Emirates, Saint Vincent and the Grenadines, Cyprus, Zambia, Nigeria, and others. The firm assists clients across 10+ jurisdictions spanning Africa, Europe, the Middle East, and offshore financial centers.

**How long does offshore company formation take?**
Timelines vary by jurisdiction: Seychelles IBC incorporations can complete in 1 business day; BVI IBCs typically in 2 days; Mauritius companies in 1–3 weeks. Regulated entity setups (with licensing) take longer — 30–45 days for some investment dealer licenses, several months for banking or full financial services licenses.

**What is the minimum capital requirement for a Mauritius Investment Dealer License?**
USD 15,000. The license is regulated by the Financial Services Commission (FSC) Mauritius and processing typically takes 30–45 days.

**What is a VASP license and where can I obtain one?**
A Virtual Asset Service Provider (VASP) license authorizes businesses to operate cryptocurrency exchanges, crypto wallet services, DeFi platforms, and NFT marketplaces under a regulated framework. Camitrade facilitates VASP licensing in Mauritius (FSC-regulated) and Seychelles (FSA-regulated), among others.

**What is the difference between an IBC in Seychelles vs BVI?**
Both are premier offshore jurisdictions with zero corporate tax. A Seychelles IBC offers 1-day incorporation, unparalleled privacy, and very low maintenance costs. A BVI IBC is slightly more prestigious as a recognized premier offshore vehicle, typically incorporating in 2 days. The best choice depends on the intended use, banking requirements, and the jurisdictions with which you do business.

**Can Camitrade help obtain a gaming license?**
Yes. Camitrade assists with gaming and gambling license applications across multiple jurisdictions including online gaming operator licenses, sports betting licenses, and casino operator licenses. Camitrade advises on jurisdiction selection based on target markets, cost, time to license, and ongoing compliance obligations.

**What ongoing support does Camitrade provide after company formation or licensing?**
Ongoing support includes corporate secretarial services, compliance monitoring, annual filing assistance, regulatory change alerts, MLRO/compliance officer outsourcing, license renewal management, and dedicated relationship management. Camitrade views every client engagement as a long-term advisory partnership.

**Does Camitrade support multi-jurisdictional operations?**
Yes — multi-jurisdictional operations are a core specialty. Camitrade coordinates company formations, licensing applications, and compliance maintenance across multiple jurisdictions simultaneously, providing a single point of contact for complex international structures.

**How does Camitrade ensure regulatory compliance?**
Through a compliance-first methodology: every recommendation is grounded in thorough analysis of local regulatory requirements, jurisdictional frameworks, and long-term compliance obligations. Camitrade maintains up-to-date regulatory knowledge across all active jurisdictions and provides ongoing monitoring as regulations evolve.

**What card networks does Camitrade support for payment processing?**
Camitrade's payment solutions network supports VISA, Mastercard, American Express (Amex), Diners Club, Discover, and JCB through vetted global payment partners.

**Is Camitrade suitable for crypto companies?**
Yes. Camitrade has deep expertise in crypto-friendly jurisdictions and VASP licensing frameworks. Services include VASP license applications in Mauritius and Seychelles, crypto company formation, AML/KYC framework design, banking solutions for crypto businesses, and ongoing regulatory compliance support.
